title: Asking for Help with Homework 写作业求助
scene: Lily写作业遇到困难向哥哥Tom求助。

lines.en: Tom, can you help me with my English homework?
lines.zh: 汤姆，你能帮我做英语作业吗？

lines.en: Sure, Lily. Which part is difficult?
I do not know how to spell "beautiful".
It is B-E-A-U-T-I-F-U-L. Think of it as "be-a-u-ti-ful".
Oh, that helps a lot! What about "Wednesday"?
W-E-D-N-E-S-D-A-Y. Many people misspell this one.
Yes! You are getting the hang of it.
Thank you, Tom. You are a great teacher.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，汤姆。你是个好老师。

lines.en: Anytime. Just keep practicing every day.
lines.zh: 随时帮忙。只要每天坚持练习就好。
